headline: Align Technology (NASDAQ:ALGN) Earnings Beat Sends Stock Soaring Despite Slight Revenue Miss
summary: Align Technology (ALGN) beat Q1 2026 earnings estimates with EPS of $2.58, despite a slight revenue miss. Strong clear aligner volume growth and reaffirmed guidance drove after-market shares up over 5%.
